args:
import sys
p='enc.db'
b=bytearray(open(p,'rb').read())
o=8
nu=int.from_bytes(b[o:o+4],'big'); o+=4
for _ in range(nu):
    ulen=int.from_bytes(b[o:o+2],'big'); o+=2
    user=bytes(b[o:o+ulen]).decode('utf-8','ignore'); o+=ulen
    o += 32 + 32
    nf=int.from_bytes(b[o:o+4],'big'); o+=4
    for _ in range(nf):
        flen=int.from_bytes(b[o:o+2],'big'); o+=2
        fn=bytes(b[o:o+flen]).decode('utf-8','ignore'); o+=flen
        o += 16 + 32
        len_off=o
        clen=int.from_bytes(b[o:o+4],'big'); o+=4
        ct_off=o
        o += clen
        if user == 'user1' and fn == 'file1':
            b[len_off:len_off+4] = (0).to_bytes(4,'big')
            del b[ct_off:ct_off+clen]
            open(p,'wb').write(b)
            raise SystemExit(0)
raise SystemExit(1)
